name: moving-assistant
description: A static moving dashboard for apartment hunting, packing, utilities, movers, and move-day planning.

scripts.check:js: node --check src/js/state.js && node --check src/js/apartments.js && node --check src/js/boxes.js && node --check src/js/movers.js && node --check src/js/app.js && node --check sw.js
